proposalId.description: Unique sequential identifier of the proposal.

proposer.description: Ethereum address of the account that submitted the proposal.

title.description: Short human-readable title of the proposal.

description.description: Full description or body text of the proposal.

createTime.description: Unix timestamp when the proposal was created.

state.description: Current lifecycle state of the proposal.

stateTimeLeft.description: Seconds remaining in the current state, or null if no time limit.

forVotes.description: Aggregate voting power in favor (decimal string).
